Flow.description: SP Energy Bot — Welfare Check Flow. Triggered by the #Mental Health# intent via GPTfy Intent Action Framework. Creates a high-priority welfare follow-up Task and posts a confidential Chatter alert to the welfare support team when a customer indicates a mental health crisis.
Flow.label: SP Welfare Check Flow

value.stringValue: WELFARE CHECK REQUIRED — Mental Health Concern Detected via GPTfy

A customer has indicated a potential mental health concern via the SP Energy GPTfy chatbot. The #Mental Health# intent was triggered during the conversation. WELFARE OFFICER: please make contact with this customer today. Handle with sensitivity and care. Review the associated support case and account record for full context. Samaritans referral was provided in the chat: 116 123 (free, 24/7) or text SHOUT to 85258.

⚠ WELFARE ALERT (Handle with Care): A customer has indicated a mental health concern via SP Energy GPTfy chatbot (#Mental Health# intent). Welfare Officer: please review the support case and make sensitive contact today. The customer was provided with crisis resources (Samaritans: 116 123). A welfare follow-up Task has been created. Please treat this with the utmost care and confidentiality.
